text: Many details have been lost to history. It appears that the attack was carried out by some kind of wand user of some sort, possibly Aremian. Most of the damage was isolated to a festival just outside the city walls.

Basil Nimble-Fingers and Solomon Moonfall were victims of this attack, and woke up in a field hospital with little to no memory of the occurrence. Shortly afterwards, Grandpa attacked the city proper.

Little is known about why Grandpa chose to attack Knork, but many accounts of his methods remain. He, along with a similarly powerful minion, destroyed buildings with beams of magical energy, focused from their eyes. He summoned an ogre to terrorize civilians.
Solomon and Basil escaped, and managed to rescue Quinn in the process.

Freddy asked the party to start an alliance to stand against Grandpa. To do this, he requested that they go to Tin Trove Mountain and find a retired knight who lives there, Sit George Grimcomb. Later, it would turn out that he was actually Georg.
Given a cart and a horse named Strangles, the party went.
Along the way, they stopped in a small village, suffering from hepatitis. Solomon helped them discover a cute for it, and they were on the road again the very next day.

At the lake on the mountain, the party discovered a cabin. Although it was in the spot they had planned to search for Georg nearly destroyed. In it was Mac the cat, and a dragon's egg. Soon after, Georg returned, and Basil unintentionally disturbed Mac, causing him to run away. Though disappointing, Georg seemed indifferent, and the journey continued on.

Tsar Georg of Kolis lived a life tormented by his brother, Tsar Freddy. In a dispute over the throne, Freddy smashed a lamp over Georg's head, and had him exiled. Freddy then spent years passing himself off as the true heir to the throne, claiming the royal birthmark on his hand as proof of this claim. Despite this, Georg had the same birthmark, and was brought back into power during a coup led by Wubbins.

Wubbins and Goose Potato agreed that Freddy needed to be removed from power, and concocted a special poison to kill Freddy. Needing revolutionaries to back them, Wubbins scooped up Basil Nimble-Fingers, Solomon Moonfall, Georg, Rachel, and Quinn, placing them safely in vats of Goose Potato's special stasis formula. This healed them until they were ready to help carry out Wubbins' assassination plot against Freddy. Basil and Solomon were eager to join.

At a special royal brunch, Lord Dessert and some cockroaches escaped from the kitchen, creating a diversion that allowed Basil to poison Freddy's brunch. Though the revolutionaries were nearly defeated by Lord Dessert, they prevailed, and Freddy died shortly after.

Georg was restored to the throne not long afterwards, and despite not living up to the rather lofty expectations of Basil and Sol, the people of Knork rejoiced, celebrating and fornicating for days afterwards.
